description: Create a content slide with a left text panel and a right horizontal stacked bar chart showing how likely vs unlikely people in each market think their country's total population will fall, including 2023 deltas.

header.headline: The total population size of my country will fall
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

sidebar.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Türkiye, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
